title: Commit window opened for insight-report disposition bundle
body: Opened git:index/head claim 21b9e92d-41d3-4766-90d4-1b9ac8ff3c2a to commit Windswept Sweeping Gale's completed insight-report disposition bundle after its owning claim was explicitly closed. Intended scope: claude-insight-report disposition plan, owner-course-correct-vocabulary pattern, pending-graduations batch entry, active/closed claim state, this comms event, and shared-comms-log.
